product_overview: A high-performance personal portfolio site that showcases projects and services, provides an interactive FAQ for discovery, and accepts project inquiries via a contact form. The site emphasizes smooth animated navigation and SEO-friendly content.
core_goals: Showcase completed projects and services with a cinematic, high-performance experience.
Provide smooth, momentum scrolling and animated page transitions for a premium UX.
Allow visitors to submit project inquiries reliably and securely.
Publish searchable FAQ content with JSON-LD to improve SEO and discoverability.
Optimize for fast global delivery and analytics on Vercel.

features.name: Navigation & Smooth Scroll
features.description: Allow visitors to move between pages with momentum scrolling and animated page transitions for a fluid browsing experience.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through pages -> Navigate to /portfolio -> See /portfolio content render with animated transition
Navigate to / -> Scroll through pages -> Navigate to /services -> See /services content render with animated transition
Navigate to / -> Use a browser or device with reduced animation support -> Observe fallback to native scrolling and reduced transitions

features.name: Contact Inquiry
features.description: Collect project inquiries by letting visitors provide contact details, complete reCAPTCHA verification, and submit a message to the backend which attempts delivery via the Resend API.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill name -> Fill email -> Fill WhatsApp -> Fill budget -> Fill message -> Complete reCAPTCHA verification -> Submit contact form -> Receive on-screen confirmation that message was sent
Navigate to /contact -> Leave required email field blank -> Complete reCAPTCHA verification -> Submit contact form -> See validation error indicating missing email

Navigate to /contact -> Fill name, email, WhatsApp, budget, and message -> Complete reCAPTCHA verification -> Submit contact form -> POST /api/contact returns server error due to missing RESEND_API_KEY -> See error message indicating delivery failed and to try again later

features.name: FAQ & SEO
features.description: Provide a searchable, expandable FAQ collection with JSON-LD schema so visitors can find answers quickly and search engines can index content effectively.
user_flows: Navigate to /faq -> Search for a question keyword -> See filtered list of FAQ items -> Expand FAQ item -> Read answer
Navigate to /faq -> Expand FAQ item -> Read answer -> Collapse FAQ item
Navigate to /faq -> Search for a nonexistent keyword -> See no-results state suggesting alternative topics

tech_stack.other: React Router, Vercel Analytics, Speed Insights, reCAPTCHA, Resend

routes.description: Frequently Asked Questions with SEO schema

features.name: Navigation & Smooth Scroll
features.description: Premium momentum scrolling with Lenis and page transitions with Framer Motion

features.name: Contact Inquiry
features.description: Submit a project inquiry form which sends an email via Resend API
user_interactions: Fill name, email, WhatsApp, budget, and message fields

features.name: FAQ & SEO
features.description: Interactive FAQ section with searchable/expandable questions and JSON-LD schema

known_limitations.issue: Contact form requires RESEND_API_KEY environment variable for actual delivery
known_limitations.impact: Form submission will fail if the key is missing or invalid
